label: Declining trend: the ad reversed the decline
verdict: The campaign reversed the decline into genuine growth. The series was trending down, but over the campaign the observed streams turn and climb on a positive slope, averaging −9.4% versus the pre-campaign level, whereas without the ad they would have kept falling to about −38.5%. The ad added an estimated 220K extra streams (95% credible interval 190K to 240K), a 47.3% lift, large enough to turn a falling trajectory into real growth, not merely a shallower decline.
